Text.Page:
Excuse me...my husband is a Mysterium sorcerer. Arimol.

He was sending letters regularly, but they abruptly stopped after he was transferred here.

I've been trying to get a meeting with {@LinkCreature:209#1005$$Tryphena}, but he'll only see soldiers. Can you see if he has any information about my husband?

Arimol? That name's not ringing a bell. Let me check the manifest.

Ah, here we are. Looks like...oh...

He's...well, I'm afraid you've got some bad news to deliver.

Oh...

I...thank you for your help.

I think I'd like to be alone for a while.
